_comment: Update this file to reflect project changes. The index.html reads it automatically. Dates use YYYY-MM-DD format. Status: green | amber | red. Phase examples: Active Development | Testing | Deployed / Monitoring | On Hold | Archived.

projects.name: avid-automation
projects.description: Automates Avid Media Composer project creation for the Assistant Editor team — clones season templates, builds folder trees, creates fresh bins, and adds writer-producer folders on demand throughout the season.
projects.notes: Core implementation complete. Deployed to AE team. Holding for longer-term feedback before planning version updates. Show-specific data lives outside the repo in gitignored local_data/.

projects.name: end-credits-tool
projects.description: Adobe After Effects CEP panel + Python backend that converts TV end-credit source documents (PDF/DOCX/XLSX/TXT) into timed, tab-separated output for the end_credits_v5.jsx AE script. Supports deterministic per-show parsers, AI-assisted extraction, Airtable integration, and frame-math automation.
projects.notes: v0.4.1 rolling out to PPC group for testing. Deterministic parser work paused pending new-season visual style changes to the credit beds. LLM extraction now routes through the Airtable worker (End Credits Tool Prompts → End Credits LLM Worker AI field) — tested live on Fire Country 407, 100% STRICT, 17.6s round-trip. OpenAI/ChatGPT provider also wired for future model comparison. Improvement work tracked under end-credits-improvement-roadmap.
subtasks: Wire Airtable worker provider into the panel 'Generate' button (one-button run)
Collect and integrate PPC feedback on v0.4.1
Resume deterministic parser work once new-season format is confirmed

projects.name: end-credits-improvement-roadmap
projects.description: Cross-show accuracy program for the End Credits Tool: improve credit extraction via three levers - frame timing (the universal last stage that runs after every method), deterministic-parser accuracy (name/role, card order, legal block, card count, groupings, verbatim text fidelity), and new parsers built assisted-first then promoted to deterministic when the source format allows. Sequenced by Start-of-Production dates. Related to the end-credits-tool project.
projects.notes: Follow-on to the Model Improvement Program. Deterministic parser work paused — new season will bring visual style changes to credit beds, so parsers will need updating once the format is confirmed. Current focus is the Airtable worker integration path. Guardrail: parsers read the approval-credits PDF source, never the verified .xls output (leakage purged 2026-06-30). Live roadmap: show-improvement-roadmap canvas + end_credits_improvement_roadmap Cursor plan.
subtasks: Resume daytime parser/frame-logic work once new-season format confirmed
Sheriff Country S02: deterministic parser (ALL-CAPS cluster) — deferred
Tracker S04: assisted prompt + finisher (mixed-case source)
Fire Country S05: mine frame profile + run gate to lift dFRAME
Panel: paired source<->result highlight for PPCs (pending feedback)

activityLog.note: Deterministic parser development paused pending new-season visual style changes; pivoting to Airtable worker integration as primary LLM path
Roadmap created; three-lever model agreed; daytime prioritized first; Fire Country parser shipped (95.9); Ghosts/Georgie deferred

projects.name: ae-script-format-update
projects.description: Update the end_credits_v5.jsx After Effects script to process end credits in a new format. Keeps the AE build step current with changes coming out of the end-credits-tool backend.
projects.notes: Requirements and scope TBD. Dependent on identifying what the new format demands from the AE script side.

activityLog.note: Project added to tracker

projects.name: airtable-document-model-training
projects.description: Use Airtable AI calls to train or fine-tune document models on end-credit source material, improving extraction accuracy without a direct API key in the production environment.
projects.notes: Exploratory. Investigating whether Airtable's AI features can act as the model-training surface, using the existing credits base as training data.

activityLog.note: Project added to tracker

projects.name: airtable-prompt-relay
projects.description: Routes end-credits extraction prompts through Airtable AI fields instead of direct API calls — the panel posts a prompt to 'End Credits Tool Prompts', an Airtable automation calls Claude Sonnet and writes the reply to 'End Credits LLM Worker', and the Python backend polls for the result and finalizes it. Removes the manual copy-paste step in the Assisted flow; no API key needed on PPC machines.
projects.notes: Core implemented and tested. AirtableWorkerProvider in providers.py posts the full extraction prompt, polls the Airtable AI field (state: generated), strips the code fence, and returns the clean draft for normal frame-math finishing. Live test: Fire Country 407, 100% STRICT/NAME/LEGAL, 17.6s round-trip. Next step: wire into the panel Generate button for one-click runs.
subtasks: Wire AirtableWorkerProvider into panel 'Generate' button (one-button run)
Add multi-worker support for side-by-side model comparison (create second AI field + worker)

activityLog.note: AirtableWorkerProvider shipped; post_llm_prompt / poll_llm_result / clear_llm_fields on AirtableClient; Airtable AI field state handling (generated/complete); live test Fire Country 407 passed (100 STRICT, 17.6s)
Project added to tracker
